{{#setmainimage:StS2 Map-Boss.png|quiet}} {{Sequel Disambiguation}} {{Stub}} {{Hatnote|See {{2|Map Locations}} for all possible rooms.}} Bosses are extremely difficult monsters that are fought at the end of each act. Compared to normal enemies and elites, bosses have significantly more health and a more powerful move set that usually involves special gimmicks that cripple the player or heavily buffs itself. Every boss has a unique portrait shown at the top of the Spire map. The map location prior to a boss fight will always be a {{2|Rest Sites|Rest Site}}, allowing the player to heal before the fight. The exception is the double Boss fight at the end of Act 3 when playing on {{Asc|10||2}} where the second boss is fought directly after the first one. == Ascension Modifiers == * {{Asc|8|Ascension|2}}: All Enemies have more HP. * {{Asc|9|Ascension|2}}: All Enemies deal more damage. * {{Asc|10|Ascension|2}}: Two bosses are fought in a row at the end of {{2|Acts|Act 3}}. == Rewards == Upon defeating the {{2|Acts|Act 1}} and {{2|Acts|Act 2}} bosses, the player is rewarded with 100 ({{Asc|3|75|2}}) {{2|Gold}}, a choice between three {{QueryLink|Cards|rarity:Rare|Rare Cards|2}}, and sometimes a random {{2|Potions|Potion}}. Afterwards, the player is sent to the start of the next Act, where they encounter an {{2|Ancient}} who heals the player for 100% ({{Asc|2|80%|2}}) of their missing health. The Ancient then gives the player a choice between three of their unique {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Ancient|Ancient Relics|2}}. == Interactions == === Relics === * {{R|Pantograph||2}}: Heals for 25 HP at the start of a Boss combat. * {{R|Stone Cracker||2}}: At the start of Boss combats, Upgrade 3 random cards in your Draw Pile for the rest of combat. * {{R|Lava Rock||2}}: The {{2|Acts|Act 1}} Boss drops 2 {{2|Relics}}. == Act 1 Bosses == One of these bosses will appear on floor 17. === Overgrowth ===

== Act 3 Bosses == One of these bosses will appear on floor 48. On {{Asc|10||2}}, a second boss (different from the first) will appear on floor 49. The second boss will also be shown on the map and at the top of the screen next to the first Act 3 Boss icon.
[[File:StS2 Map-Queen.png|class=elite-img|link=Slay_the_Spire_2:Queen]]
{{2|Queen}}
[[File:StS2 Map-TestSubject.png|class=elite-img|link=Slay_the_Spire_2:Test Subject]]
{{2|Test Subject}}
[[File:StS2 Map-Doormaker.png|class=elite-img|link=Slay_the_Spire_2:Doormaker]]
{{2|Doormaker}}
Note: *The floor numbers listed here are referring to a regular Singleplayer run. If the player picks up {{R|Golden Compass||2}} at the start of Act 2, the map is replaced by a single-path map that is 2 floors longer than the regular Act 2. All floor numbers after that therefore have to be increased by 2. *If playing {{2|Multiplayer}}, each Act is 1 floor shorter which leads to the Act 1 Boss fight on floor 16, the Act 2 Boss fight on floor 31, and the Act 3 Boss fight on floor 45.
